title: Require Domain Model Schema And Policy Owner Shape
forbids: domain model schemas or policy files that recreate config bags, operation envelopes, stage authoring surfaces, or imports from operation, recipe, adapter, runtime, or official resource owners
why: Domain model schemas are reusable semantic primitives and domain model policy is reusable semantic law. Neither owner should become a renamed config facade, operation contract bucket, stage authoring helper, or official-resource wrapper.
remediate: Move reusable TypeBox primitives to model/schemas/*.schema.ts, move semantic constants/functions to model/policy/*.ts, keep full operation envelopes in ops/<operation>/contract.ts, and keep stage public/knobs/compile composition with the owning stage.
message: Domain model schemas and policy must not recreate config, operation, stage, adapter, or resource authority.
